name: MoneyGram
description_short: MoneyGram Columbus, Ohio — MoneyGram is a global money transfer service with 65+ locations in Columbus offering domestic and international transfers, bi...
description_long:
MoneyGram is an established money transfer company that operates through a network of agent locations rather than company-owned branches. The company partners with retail chains like CVS and Walmart, as well as independent service providers like Tu Aliado Express and El Girasol Mexican Grocery, to provide accessible financial services across Columbus, Ohio and surrounding areas. This distributed model allows MoneyGram to maintain a significant physical presence with 65 search results in the Columbus area alone.

The core service offering includes sending and receiving money domestically and internationally, with locations available for both online and offline transactions. Customers can search for nearby locations by address, city, state, or ZIP code and manage transfers conveniently. The service is integrated into existing retail partnerships, meaning customers can conduct transfers while shopping at partner locations. MoneyGram also offers money orders and bill payment services based on the check-cashing category positioning.

MoneyGram's primary distinction is its extensive agent network model, which provides wider geographic coverage than traditional standalone locations. By partnering with established retailers and independent multiservice providers, MoneyGram reaches diverse neighborhoods and communities. The availability at both large national chains (CVS, Walmart) and local specialty stores (El Girasol, Tu Aliado Express) suggests the service caters to both mainstream and underbanked populations, including Spanish-speaking communities.

The service is best suited for consumers who need convenient money transfer access without visiting a dedicated financial institution. However, pricing information, transfer fees, exchange rates, and exact service details are not disclosed on the location-finder page provided. The website focuses on location discovery rather than comprehensive service information, which limits visibility into competitive advantages, speed of transfers, or cost comparisons with alternatives.
pros: Extensive agent network with 65+ locations in Columbus area, providing widespread accessibility
Available at major retailers (CVS, Walmart) for convenient one-stop shopping and transfers
Partnerships with multicultural service providers (El Girasol, Tu Aliado Express) serving diverse communities
Online and offline transfer options for flexible customer preferences
Extended operating hours at many locations (some open until 8:00 PM or 9:00 PM)
Multi-language support evident through partnerships with Spanish-language service providers
Search functionality allows customers to find nearest location by address, city, or ZIP
cons: No pricing, fee structure, or exchange rate information disclosed on website
Limited service details provided—website is location-finder only, not service description page
Transfer speed and processing times not specified
No information about customer service, dispute resolution, or fraud protection
Dependent on agent partner availability and operating hours, which vary significantly by location
best_for: Consumers needing convenient domestic money transfers without visiting a bank
International senders supporting family or business partners abroad
Underbanked populations in underserved neighborhoods with limited banking access
Multicultural communities preferring services offered in Spanish and at culturally-relevant retailers
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for consumers who need accessible, neighborhood-based money transfer services without traditional banking infrastructure. The primary caveat is the complete absence of transparent pricing and service details on this location-finder page, making cost comparison and informed decision-making difficult—consumers must contact individual locations for quotes and fees.
services: In-person transfer services at agent locations
Location search by address, city, state, or ZIP code
Transfer services through CVS pharmacy locations
Transfer services through independent multiservice providers
Transfers available during extended retail hours
